# Demo: Hair Salon (Salon Fryzjerski)

> A demo website for a hair salon, built by freelance web developer Konrad Malinowski
> as part of his portfolio. React 19 + TypeScript, static frontend with simulated
> bookings — it shows prospective clients what their own salon website could look like.

The site content is in Polish. All data (stylists, services, reviews, blog posts) is
mock data; the multi-step booking flow is simulated client-side with no backend.

## Features

- Multi-step booking system: stylist → service → time slot → confirmation
- Masonry project gallery with lightbox and category filtering
- Stylist cards with bios, specializations, and ratings
- Client testimonial carousel and a hair-care/trends blog
- Fully responsive, mobile-first

## Tech

- React 19, TypeScript, Vite, React Router 7
- Zustand (booking state), React Hook Form + Zod (validation)
- Framer Motion (animations), Tailwind CSS
